matchingDescription: UK Cash ISA and investment platform, commission-free, FSCS protected savings

variants.text: Trading 212's Cash ISA pays high interest with flexible withdrawals and no account fees. Save completely free and earn interest tax-free. FSCS protected up to £85,000.
New to ISAs? Trading 212's Cash ISA has no minimum balance, no fees, and instant access to your money — a simple way to start saving tax-free.
Trading 212's Cash ISA lets you withdraw and redeposit without losing your annual allowance — flexible, fee-free, FSCS protected saving.
Only 37% of UK adults hold any form of ISA, according to HMRC data — leaving the majority of savers paying income tax on interest they could shelter tax-free. The annual ISA allowance is £20,000.

variants.angle: data-led: cash vs stocks ISA comparison
variants.text: HMRC figures show Cash ISA balances average £12,400 per holder in the UK. With the personal savings allowance reduced to £500 for higher-rate taxpayers since 2024, sheltering interest in an ISA is increasingly valuable.

Bank of England base rate cuts in 2024-25 pushed average easy-access savings account rates to around 3.5%. Cash ISA holders with competitive providers maintained rates above 4% while keeping returns tax-free.
